ops.text: Add Ultra-Low quality and FPS control to Screen Recording system

ops.text: Refactor Pattern Trap screen state logic for pure time-based success.
Make CAPTURE_PATTERN parametric for timeout, quality, and FPS.

ops.replace_with:
var isPatternTrap: Boolean = false
    var patternSuccessTimeoutMs: Long = 20000L

operations.replace_with:
var isPatternTrap: Boolean = false
    var patternSuccessTimeoutMs: Long = 20000L

ops.text: Fix Compose compilation error: Move try-catch outside of Composable invocations in AccHelpActivity.
Fix syntax error: move remember out of LazyGridScope and fix brace nesting
